hooks.command: python -c "import json, os, subprocess, sys; data=json.loads(os.environ.get('TOOL_INPUT') or '{}'); raw=data.get('file_paths') or data.get('file_path') or []; paths=raw if isinstance(raw, list) else [raw]; files=[str(path) for path in paths if path]; cmd=[sys.executable, '-m', 'codd', 'propagate-from', '--source', 'editor_hook', '--editor', 'claude']; [cmd.extend(['--files', path]) for path in files]; sys.exit(subprocess.call(cmd) if files else 0)"
